# Leadex Holding GmbH

> A German financial holding group based in Bad Homburg v. d. Höhe, owning and managing two operating subsidiaries under the Leadex Systems brand across Europe and the Middle East.

## About

Leadex Holding GmbH is incorporated in Germany (HRB 17278, Amtsgericht Bad Homburg v.d.H.), registered at Basler Straße 3, Bad Homburg v. d. Höhe, 61352. The holding group owns two active entities that operate under the unified Leadex Systems brand.

Website: https://leadexholding.com
Contact: mail@leadexholding.com
Phone: +49 15888 652234

## Subsidiaries

### LEADEX CY LTD — European operations
- Jurisdiction: Cyprus
- Registration: HE380377
- VAT: CY10380377R
- Incorporated: 23 February 2018
- Address: 2-4 Galateias Street, Paphos 8046, Cyprus
- Market: Europe
- Brand website: https://leadexsystems.com

### LEADEX SYSTEMS L.L.C-FZ — Middle East operations
- Jurisdiction: United Arab Emirates (Meydan Free Zone)
- Trade License: 2200983.01
- VAT / TRN: 104067824300003
- Address: Office 136, Regus Deira City Centre, Port Saeed Rd., Dubai, UAE
- Market: Middle East / MENA
- Brand website: https://leadexsystems.com

## Business Activities

Financial services, financial holding, operations connected to financial and insurance services.

## Brand

Both subsidiaries operate under the Leadex Systems brand. Common website: https://leadexsystems.com
